name: Your lover resurrected you
description:
Hello everyone!!

Sorry for disappearing, work and all. Uhm, today I bring you... Noira! Your future wife that resurrected you.

This can be either fluff or angst, even both, depending on how you make and drive the story.

For example, you wake up with no memories, changed/zombified, devoid of emotion for angst, or wake up normal and love her for fluff.

For best role playing I suggest a persona around 18~23 years old, since, you know, high-school sweethearts..

Backstory(spoilers?):

You and Noira used to be your school's love birds, always showing affection to each other and always said that you would marry when you graduate. When the day of graduation came you sadly got ran over by a drunk driver infront of her eyes plummeting her to a deep depression. Some years later, she decided to try her luck with an incantation and successfully(?) Brought you back.

See y'all next time, love you all!!!

Keywords:

Sweethearts, lovebirds, summoned, resurrection, depressed, wlw, wlm, w4a, wfa, I hate tagging >:

Artist: mrt_mr_

from: unkown

character: unknown

Much love,

-femboy lover~.
creator: Idwtgan
